ab: hicaen isu tayni?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: culil han aku tayni.
en: I came on foot.

ab: u canan ku kacawan isu tayni?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: makabasu kaku tayni.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: hicaen isu tayza i kiwkay?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: makazizeng tupinan ni ama tayza kaku.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: hicaen niza tayza i cudadan?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: u nulpin ku kacawan niza tayza i cacudadan.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: hicaen ni bai isu tayza micakay tu lami’?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: makautubay ciniza micakay tu lami’.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: a hicaen isu tayza i Butu?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: makabalunga kaku tayza i Butu.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: a hicaen isu tayza i Butu?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: makahikuki tayza i Butu ciniza.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: u canan ku kacawan niza tayza i Takaw?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: siwmalay ku kacawan niza tayza i Takaw.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: u silamalay ku kacawan niza tayza i Pusung?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: hang, u silamala ku kacawan niza tayza i Pusung.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: u silamalay ku kacawan niza tayza i Pusung?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: cayay, u hikuki ku kacawan niza tayza i Pusung.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: izaw ku kakacawan tu basu i capi haw?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: izaw taayaw han maazih tu kakacawan tu basu.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: i cuwa ku macapiay a kakacawan tu nulpin?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: nayi’ ku kakacawan tu nulpin i tini, u hayya dada’ ku sakacaw isu.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: mikacaw tu basu matenes haw katukuh i cacudadan?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: sabaw lima sasulitan katukuh i cacudadan.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: mikacaw tu siwmalay pina a tatukian katukuh i Tayciw?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: cacay a tatukiay makatukuh tu i Tayciw.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: pakazizeng tayza i Ulay matenes haw?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: pakala tu cacay a tatukian.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: makanulpin kisu tayni i luma’ aku a matenes haw?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: makala tu tusaay a bataan nu sasulitan.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: matineng kisu makabalikal haw?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: matineng makabatikal kaku.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: izaw ku utubay isu haw?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: izaw ku cacay a utubay aku.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: siutubay kisu haw?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: nayi’ ku utubay aku.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
